name: Deviled Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds potatoes, cooked, peeled and cut into cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the dressing and mustard blend.
2. Add the potatoes and eggs; toss gently to coat.
3. Cover; chill.
4. If desired, spoon into lettuce-lined bowl and garnish with chopped parsley.
Variation:
To make Deviled Ham Potato Salad, add 1 cup diced cooked ham with the potatoes and hard-cooked eggs.
